prompt: Write markdown API documentation for a hypothetical `/v1/users` REST endpoint that supports GET (list), POST (create), and DELETE (by id). Include request/response examples in fenced JSON blocks. Target 250 words.

baseline.text:
# Users API

Base URL: `https://api.example.com/v1`

Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header.

## GET /v1/users

List users. Supports `limit` (default 20, max 100) and `cursor` query params for pagination.

Request:

```http
GET /v1/users?limit=2 HTTP/1.1
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

Response `200 OK`:

```json
{
  "data": [
    { "id": "usr_a1b2", "email": "ada@example.com", "created_at": "2026-04-01T10:22:00Z" },
    { "id": "usr_c3d4", "email": "grace@example.com", "created_at": "2026-04-03T14:08:11Z" }
  ],
  "next_cursor": "eyJvZmZzZXQiOjJ9"
}
```

## POST /v1/users

Create a user. `email` is required and must be unique.

Request:

```json
{
  "email": "linus@example.com",
  "name": "Linus"
}
```

Response `201 Created`:

```json
{
  "id": "usr_e5f6",
  "email": "linus@example.com",
  "name": "Linus",
  "created_at": "2026-04-20T09:00:00Z"
}
```

Errors: `400` for malformed body, `409` if email already exists.

## DELETE /v1/users/{id}

Delete a user by id. Idempotent — deleting an already-removed id returns `204`.

Request:

```http
DELETE /v1/users/usr_e5f6 HTTP/1.1
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

Response `204 No Content` (empty body).

Errors: `401` for missing/invalid token, `403` if caller lacks `users:delete` scope.

## Common error shape

```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "invalid_request",
    "message": "email is required"
  }
}
```

llm.text:
# Users API

Base URL: `https://api.example.com/v1`

Auth: Bearer token in the `Authorization` header.

## GET /v1/users

Lists users. Two query params: `limit` (default 20, max 100) and `cursor` for pagination.

Request:

```http
GET /v1/users?limit=2 HTTP/1.1
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

Response `200 OK`:

```json
{
  "data": [
    { "id": "usr_a1b2", "email": "ada@example.com", "created_at": "2026-04-01T10:22:00Z" },
    { "id": "usr_c3d4", "email": "grace@example.com", "created_at": "2026-04-03T14:08:11Z" }
  ],
  "next_cursor": "eyJvZmZzZXQiOjJ9"
}
```

## POST /v1/users

Creates a user. `email` is required and must be unique.

Request:

```json
{
  "email": "linus@example.com",
  "name": "Linus"
}
```

Response `201 Created`:

```json
{
  "id": "usr_e5f6",
  "email": "linus@example.com",
  "name": "Linus",
  "created_at": "2026-04-20T09:00:00Z"
}
```

Errors: `400` for a malformed body, `409` if the email is already taken.

## DELETE /v1/users/{id}

Deletes a user by id. Idempotent — calling it on an id that's already gone still returns `204`.

Request:

```http
DELETE /v1/users/usr_e5f6 HTTP/1.1
Authorization: Bearer <token>
```

Response `204 No Content` with an empty body.

Errors: `401` if the token is missing or invalid, `403` if the caller doesn't have the `users:delete` scope.

## Common error shape

```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "invalid_request",
    "message": "email is required"
  }
}
```
